TextEquiv.PlainText: Siman Woont in de hewagom korle
TextEquiv.Unicode: Siman Woont in de hewagom korle

TextEquiv.PlainText: suster gent dona ana Woont in de Pasdhim korle
TextEquiv.Unicode: suster gent dona ana Woont in de Pasdhim korle

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1 gen anna dias getrouwt & woent alhier
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1 gen anna dias getrouwt & woent alhier

TextEquiv.PlainText: Makota ,, d=o ,, do in t corp Na Hadoens in de
TextEquiv.Unicode: Makota „ d=o „ do in t corp Na Hadoens in de

TextEquiv.PlainText: dominga do & getrouwt e Woont alhier
TextEquiv.Unicode: dominga do & getrouwt e Woont alhier

TextEquiv.PlainText: 1: d=o Natalia dias d=o ,, ,, in de hina korla
TextEquiv.Unicode: 1: d=o Natalia dias d=o „ „ in de hina korla
